title: Front-end Developer @ lingohub GmbH
description:
Front-end Developer @ lingohub GmbH

💾 Job Technologies

- JavaScript
- TypeScript
- Vue.js
- CSS
- Storyblok
- RESTful API

👥 Your role in the team

You have a keen eye for detail and want to build interfaces that not only work but also feel really good? At LingoHub, you develop modern frontends for our AI-based translation platform and our website – from reusable components to production-ready features.

If you enjoy working with TypeScript, Vue.js, and clear UI structures, want to take on technical responsibility, and are eager to join a focused team, then you are exactly right with us.

As a Frontend Developer at LingoHub, you will be responsible for our frontend architecture and oversee features from conception to integration.

- You develop and maintain frontend features using JavaScript, TypeScript, and Vue.js.
- You assume technical responsibility in the frontend and contribute to architecture, tooling, and technology decisions.
- You build reusable UI components for our app and website and work with Storyblok on content-driven pages.
- You translate design prototypes together with UX/UI design into consistent, intuitive user experiences.
- You integrate REST APIs, coordinate closely with the backend team, and ensure high-performance, reliable interfaces.
- You ensure quality, performance, accessibility, and maintainability, and bring your frontend experience into the further development of our platform.

🌟 Our expectations of you

Qualifications
You develop modern frontends that reliably function in everyday use. You work in a structured manner, think along, and have a good sense of when a functioning feature turns into a truly great user experience.

Your Stack

- JavaScript
- TypeScript
- Vue.js
- CSS, component design, and responsive layouts

Your Skills

- Several years of experience in developing modern frontends with JavaScript, TypeScript, and Vue.js – production-ready, maintainable, and reliable.
- Solid understanding of CSS, component architecture, responsive layouts, and clean, consistent user experiences.
- Experience with REST APIs, performant API integrations, and CMS-based frontends, ideally with Storyblok or another headless CMS.
- Structured working approach, clear coding style, and high standards for quality, maintainability, and performance.
- Curiosity and pragmatism, combined with the ability to think beyond individual features to deliver real value for users.
- Secure communication in English, both written and spoken, as English is our company language.

Nice-to-have

- Experience with component libraries, design systems, or testing frameworks such as Jest, Vitest, Cypress, or Playwright.
- Experience in performance optimization or accessibility, e.g., fast load times, responsive layouts, and accessible interfaces.
- Experience with React or Angular

Qualifications

- Several years of experience in developing modern frontends with JavaScript, TypeScript, and Vue.js – production-ready, maintainable, and reliable.
- Solid understanding of CSS, component architecture, responsive layouts, and clean, consistent user experiences.
- Experience with REST APIs, performant API integrations, and CMS-based frontends, ideally with Storyblok or another headless CMS.

🎁 What we offer

You will become part of a small, experienced team that works independently and has a good sense of our users' needs.

- Hybrid setup:Flexible and autonomous work, preferably mostly remote, with regular coordination within the team.
- Focus:Few meetings, clear coordination, and plenty of room for deep work.
- Direct Impact:You work closely with product and strategy and actively contribute your perspective.
- Stability:We are product-driven, profitable, and not bound by VC timelines – this allows us to grow sustainably and with a clear focus.
- Shared time:Team events in and around Linz where we can also exchange ideas in person.
- Further development:Further education, conferences, and professional literature – your development is important to us.

For this position, a collective agreement minimum salary of € 3,954 gross per month based on a 38.5-hour workweek applies. The classification is according to the IT collective agreement in the employment group ST1, standard level. The actual pay depends on your qualifications and experience. Overpayment is, of course, possible depending on your profile. The salary is paid 14 times a year.

🎉 Benefits

Health, Fitness & Fun

- 🎳 Team Events
Work-Life-Integration

- ⏰ Flexible Working Hours
- 🚌 Excellent Traffic Connections
- 🏠 Home Office
- ⏸ Educational Leave/Sabbatical

💡 Topics that you deal with on the job

- AI
- Architecture
- User Interaction
- Integrations

📍 Job Locations

- Standort Linz Hauptplatz 23 4020 Linz Austria

💰 Salary

from 3.954€ gross per month

🏢 This is your employer

lingohub GmbH
📍 Linz

LingoHub can help you become a master at translation, and connect with some of the world's best translators. With its automation and optimization features, it'll make your workflow smoother than ever before.
